This pear tree is partially hidden behind other trees, but even though you may not be able to reach the pears on the tree, there will be fallen fruits absolutely everywhere. Access: Public.
A nice pear tree in the field behind the stands at Holland Christian High School. There is a wasp nest, so tread carefully. Access: Permitted by owner.
Falling Fruit access: Permitted by owner.
Black raspberry bushes are all over this area, but you might have to pick or look for them by going off the path. Be careful of the thorns. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-August.
